programmes.show_description: Silverfinger Singh is stepping into the Desi Dancefloor Mix and blending the slickest sounds.

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: Tanya Chaundhry joins Harleen Nottay to discuss her male and female perfume company Khane. The pair discuss the influence of her family and how she's built her brand over time.

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: Sonia Sabri, who runs her own South Asian dance and music company, joins Harleen Nottay to discuss how she became a successful entrepreneur in the arts world.

programmes.show_name: Asian Network Motivation with Sarover Aulja
programmes.show_description: Sarover reminds you that healing doesn't need an apology. Choose yourself, set boundaries and move forward with peace, power and main character energy.

Will you be able to guess the film from our cryptic commentary, or will you be Lost in Bollywood? Vallisa also plays her favourite female artists on Bollywood Sing-Along Anthems.

programmes.show_description: Asian Network Certified Throwback bangers! Big anthems you haven't heard in ages!

DJ Kizzi soundtracks your Saturday nights with the biggest and best tunes, Asian anthems and mixes.
Manara's back, drifting through time and spice for three hours of pure magic. She's dug DEEP for this one. Contains strong language.

DJ Kizzi soundtracks your Saturday nights with the biggest and best tunes, Asian anthems and mixes.

programmes.show_description: Bringing a Certified Bollywood Celebrations mix straight to your speakers! Expect music from Benny Dayal, Akon, Badshah, Pawni Pandey and Kishore Kumar.

programmes.show_name: Asian Network's Club Hit Squad Mix

programmes.show_name: Asian Network Bollywood with Gagan Grewal
programmes.show_description: It's time to rewind the Bollywood rhythm with Gagan Grewal as he plays classic hits including a track from the movie Teraa Surroor and some Fardeen Khan tunes!

programmes.show_name: Asian Network Punjabi with Dipps Bhamrah
programmes.show_description: Dipps marks International Women's Day with a Female Frenzy. Two hours celebrating the queens of the scene and the voices that have shaped Bhangra across generations.
